name: hotel-website
description: Luxury Haven hotel website with client and admin Express servers

scripts.build:css: npm exec --prefix Client/server tailwindcss -- -i Client/public/css/tailwind.css -o Client/public/css/tailwind.generated.css --content "Client/public/**/*.html" --content "Client/public/js/**/*.js" --content "admin/public/**/*.html" --content "admin/public/js/**/*.js" && npm exec --prefix Client/server tailwindcss -- -i Client/public/css/tailwind.css -o admin/public/css/tailwind.generated.css --content "Client/public/**/*.html" --content "Client/public/js/**/*.js" --content "admin/public/**/*.html" --content "admin/public/js/**/*.js"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix shared && npm install --prefix Client/server && npm install --prefix admin/server
